Home/Investors

Fundraising · internal narrative

Business acquisition systems with a proof moat.

SourceA turns ideas into deployable, proof-backed revenue engines. Capability is built — the company is in revenue validation: first paying customers, then scale. One brand outward; Factory, Runtime, and Proof inward.

Request intro→ Technical kernel→

Thesis

Deterministic execution + accumulating proof

Most AI tooling sells hope. SourceA ships governed execution — validators, loops, receipts — and packages it for buyers as acquisition systems that win contracts. As deployments compound, the Proof layer becomes proprietary intelligence on what converts.

Internal OS name: Deterministic Business Operating System (DBOS). External sell: proof-backed acquisition systems in 48 hours.

Stage

Product built · distribution opening

Built

Factory, Runtime, Proof layers operational. Live demo deployable on calls.

Now

Revenue validation — target 3 paying customers or $3K–$10K in 30 days. Bottleneck is sales, not engineering.

Moat

Validated execution + proof library — harder to copy than reports or agents alone.

Revenue model

How money comes in

  • Build-for-you deployments — setup fees ($1.5–5K+) plus optional recurring proof support
  • Vertical packs — pre-configured acquisition systems for high-fit niches
  • Runtime access — subscription for teams needing orchestration and proof tools

Early wedge: service operators and agency warm network — fast cash, real validation.

Investor conversations

Email for deck, live proof on the page, and current traction. Commercial buyers use Offer — this page is for capital partners.
